# FitTrack Pro

> Workout and body-tracking PWA: log exercises, track measurements, calculate calories, and visualize progress with AI insights.

## Pages

- [Home / Landing](/#/landing): Product overview, features, and how it works.
- [Pricing](/#/pricing): Free plan and Pro subscription ($1/month or $10/year) with 7-day free trial.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/#/auth): Authentication for accessing the tracker.
- [Contact](/#/contact): Support email and response times.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/#/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/#/privacy)
- [Refund Policy](/#/refund)
